title: Wavy World
description: Adds options to make the world bend
body:
this is a wacky very customizeable shader that allows you to make a ton of diffrent waves it is insanely reccomended to open up the settings and play around in there

SETTINGS:

There are 3 subcategories Out X,Out Y and Out Z each one is a direction and each one decides where will the block move there are 8 Options in each one: 

Enabled: Enable/Disable this subcategorie 
Speed: Speed of the wave 
Dead Zone: calm zone around the player 
Falloff: The higher the number the lower the waves 
Scale: the farther away the wave the longer it is 
Bumps Or Divots: Whether to show bumps, divots, or both 
Offset: Offset the cycle of the waves 
Length: Only works when scale is off Makes it that everywhere has the same length wave 
Y: Make waves go in Y/Y- Direction 
X: Make waves go in X/X- Direction 
Z: Make waves go in X/X- Direction
